case_title: ANDREW S. PARK et al VS. R.C. CHRONICLE BUILDING L.P. et al

ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT R.C. CHRONICLE BUILDING L.P. THE RITZ-CARLTON HOTEL COMPANY, LLC THE RITZ-CARLTON DEVELOPMENT COMPANY, INC. THE RITZ-CARLTON SALES COMPANY, INC. THE RITZ-CARLTON MANAGEMENT COMPANY, LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS R.C. CHRONICLE BUILDING L.P., THE RITZ-CARLTON HOTEL COMPANY, LLC, THE RITZ-CARLTON DEVELOPMENT COMPANY, INC., THE RITZ-CARLTON SALES COMPANY, INC., THE RITZ-CARLTON MANAGEMENT COMPANY, LLC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER SUSTAINED AS FOLLOWS: AS TO THE 1ST, 2ND AND 3RD CAUSES OF ACTION, THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FACTS THAT SHOW 1) THE TIME AND MANNER OF DISCOVERY OF MISREPRESENTATION/FRAUD, AND 2) PLAINTIFFS' INABILITY TO HAVE MADE THE DISCOVERY AT AN EARLIER DATE DESPITE REASONABLE DILIGENCE. AS TO THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION, THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FACTS DEMONSTRATING A FIDUCIARY DUTY OWED BY DEFENDANTS. AS TO THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION, THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD DAMAGES FROM DEFENDANTS' PURPORTED BREACH. AS TO THE 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION, THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND (SEE 1ST, 2ND, 3RD CAUSES OF ACTION). AS TO THE 11TH CAUSE OF ACTION, THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. UNCONSCIONABILITY IS NOT A CAUSE OF ACTION BUT A DEFENSE, AND DEFENDANT WAS NOT A PARTY TO THE CONTRACTS. AS TO THE 13TH CAUSES OF ACTION, THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. DEFENDANT IS NOT A TRUSTEE OR BENEFICIARY TO THE DEED OF TRUST OR NOTE. AS TO THE 14TH CAUSE OF ACTION, THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. AS TO THE 16TH AND 17TH CAUSES OF ACTION, THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. (302)

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS ANDREW S. PARK AND ANNIE I. KIM'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S ARE UNLIKELY TO PREVAIL ON THE MERITS AND PLAINTIFFS' HARM IS NOT IRREPARABLE. PLAINTIFFS' EVIDENTIARY SHOWING IS WEAK AND PLAINTIFFS ADMIT PRESENTING UNTRUTHFUL LOAN DOCUMENTS. THERE IS NO REQUIREMENT THAT THE NOTE BE PRODUCED. PLAINTIFF'S NO LONGER LIVE AT THE PREMISES. DFENDANT HAS PRODUCED DOCUMENTATION SHOWING THAT HOUSEKEY HAS SUBSTITUTED IN AS THE TRUSTEE. PLAINTIFFS' MAY NOT RAISE A NEW ARGUMENT IN THEIR REPLY REGARDING THE BOOK NUMBER, AND IN SUFFICIENT AUTHORITY PRESENTED THAT SUCH AN ERROR WOULD RENDER THE SALE VOID AS OPPOSED TO VOIDABLE. DEFENDANTS HAVE NOT TENDERED. THE LENDER IS NOT REQUIRED TO MODIFY THE LOAN UNDER THE CIVIL CODE, AND DEFENDANT PRESENTS SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE OF DUE DILLIGENCE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. IN ADDITION, THE COURT DID NOT CONSIDER LATE FILED SURREBUTTAL OF HSBC. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797. (302)

LAW AND MOTION, DEFENDANT HSBC MORTGAGE CORPORATION (USA) DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED VERIFIED COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT TOOK THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. AFTER HEARING, THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED AS THE FINAL RULING - DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 1ST, 2ND AND 3RD CAUSES OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FACTS THAT SHOW THE TIME AND MANNER OF DISCOVERY OF THE MISREPRESENTATION/FRAUD AND PLAINTIFF'S INABILITY TO HAVE MADE THE DISCOVERY. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. ALL ACTIONS PLAINTIFF CLAIMS DEFENDANT HSBC ENGAGED IN OCCURRED PRIOR TO TIME THE CONTRACT WAS ENTERED INTO AND, THEREFORE, COULD NOT HAVE INTERFERRED WITH THE PERFORMANCE OR ENFORCEMENT OF THE CONTRACT. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND.DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. THIS CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUFFICIENTLY PLED. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 10TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 11TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. UNCONSCIONABILITY IS NOT A CAUSE OF ACTION. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 12TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. WHILE DEFENDANT IS CORRECT THAT THERE IS NOT A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR UNJUST ENRICHMENT, PLAINTIFFS HAVE STATED ENOUGH FOR RELIEF IN THE FORM OF RESTITUTION. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 13TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 14TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. THE ACCOUNTING CAUSE OF ACTION STANDS ALONE AND PLEADS ADEQUATE FACTS TO SHOW THAT AN ACCOUNTING IS NECESSARY. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 15TH-17TH CAUSES OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. THESE CAUSES OF ACTION RELY ON THE UNDERLYING FRAUD CAUSE OF ACTION AND THEREFORE FAIL FOR THE SAME REASONS SET FORTH ABOVE. MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. (302)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-07-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT HSBC MORTGAGE CORPORATION (USA) DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED VERIFIED COMPLAINT.

APPEARANCES: Ryan Sanders, Esq. of Law Office of Uy & Henrioulle 510/835-3730 for pltf & opposing party (appearing via CourtCall); James H. French, Esq. of French & Lyon 597-7813 for deft & moving party.

RULING: Argued and the Court took the matter under submission.
After hearing, the Court ruled as follows: tentative ruling adopted as the final ruling - DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 1ST, 2ND AND 3RD CAUSES OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FACTS THAT SHOW THE TIME AND MANNER OF DISCOVERY OF THE MISREPRESENTATION/FRAUD AND PLAINTIFF'S INABILITY TO HAVE MADE THE DISCOVERY.
DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED.
DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. ALL ACTIONS PLAINTIFF CLAIMS DEFENDANT HSBC ENGAGED IN OCCURRED PRIOR TO TIME THE CONTRACT WAS ENTERED INTO AND, THEREFORE, COULD NOT HAVE INTERFERRED WITH THE PERFORMANCE OR ENFORCEMENT OF THE CONTRACT.
DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND.
DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. THIS CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUFFICIENTLY PLED.
DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 10TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED.
DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 11TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. UNCONSCIONABILITY IS NOT A CAUSE OF ACTION.
DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 12TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. WHILE DEFENDANT IS CORRECT THAT THERE IS NOT A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR UNJUST ENRICHMENT, PLAINTIFFS HAVE STATED ENOUGH FOR RELIEF IN THE FORM OF RESTITUTION.
DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 13TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED.
DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 14TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. THE ACCOUNTING CAUSE OF ACTION STANDS ALONE AND PLEADS ADEQUATE FACTS TO SHOW THAT AN ACCOUNTING IS NECESSARY.
DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 15TH-17TH CAUSES OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. THESE CAUSES OF ACTION RELY ON THE UNDERLYING FRAUD CAUSE OF ACTION AND THEREFORE FAIL FOR THE SAME REASONS SET FORTH ABOVE.
Moving party to prepare a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-24-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS R.C. CHRONICLE BUILDING L.P., THE RITZ-CARLTON HOTEL COMPANY, LLC, THE RITZ-CARLTON DEVELOPMENT COMPANY, INC., THE RITZ-CARLTON SALES COMPANY, INC., THE RITZ-CARLTON MANAGEMENT COMPANY, LLC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Appearances: Cathy A. Hongola of Allen Matkins (273.7470) for defendants and moving parties. No other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: demurrer sustained as follows:
As to the 1st, 2nd and 3rd causes of action, the demurrer is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff must plead facts that show 1) the time and manner of discovery of misrepresentation/fraud, and 2) plaintiffs' inability to have made the discovery at an earlier date despite reasonable diligence.
As to the 4th cause of action, the demurrer is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff must plead facts demonstrating a fiduciary duty owed by defendants.
As to the 5th cause of action, the demurrer is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff must plead damages from defendants' purported breach.
As to the 8th cause of action, the demurrer is sustained with leave to amend (see 1st, 2nd, 3rd causes of action).
As to the 11th cause of action, the demurrer is sustained without leave to amend. Unconscionability is not a cause of action but a defense, and defendant was not a party to the contracts.
As to the 13th causes of action, the demurrer is sustained without leave to amend. Defendant is not a trustee or beneficiary to the deed of trust or note.
As to the 14th cause of action, the demurrer is sustained without leave to amend.
As to the 16th and 17th causes of action, the demurrer is sustained without leave to amend. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Plaintiffs Andrew S. Park And Annie J. I. Kim'S Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Nov-04-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFFS ANDREW S. PARK AND ANNIE I. KIM'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION.

APPEARANCES: Ryan Sanders, Esq. of Law Office of Uy and Henrioulle 510/835-3730 for pltfs & moving parties; James H. French, Esq. of French & Lyon 597-7813 for deft & opposing party HSBC Mortgage Corporation (USA) And Housekey Financial Corporation; Cathy A. Hongola, Esq. of Allen Matkins Leck Gamble Mallory & Natsis LLP 273-7470 for Ritz-Carlton defts & opposing parties.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S ARE UNLIKELY TO PREVAIL ON THE MERITS AND PLAINTIFFS' HARM IS NOT IRREPARABLE. PLAINTIFFS' EVIDENTIARY SHOWING IS WEAK AND PLAINTIFFS ADMIT PRESENTING UNTRUTHFUL LOAN DOCUMENTS. THERE IS NO REQUIREMENT THAT THE NOTE BE PRODUCED. PLAINTIFF'S NO LONGER LIVE AT THE PREMISES. DFENDANT HAS PRODUCED DOCUMENTATION SHOWING THAT HOUSEKEY HAS SUBSTITUTED IN AS THE TRUSTEE. PLAINTIFFS' MAY NOT RAISE A NEW ARGUMENT IN THEIR REPLY REGARDING THE BOOK NUMBER, AND IN SUFFICIENT AUTHORITY PRESENTED THAT SUCH AN ERROR WOULD RENDER THE SALE VOID AS OPPOSED TO VOIDABLE. DEFENDANTS HAVE NOT TENDERED. THE LENDER IS NOT REQUIRED TO MODIFY THE LOAN UNDER THE CIVIL CODE, AND DeFENDANT PRESENTS SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE OF DUE DILLIGENCE. Order signed in open court. In addition, the Court did not consider late filed surrebuttal of HSBC. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
